svg.text: Weighted vs unweighted Gower — decision guide
What weighting does to the formula
Your features — implicit weight problem to watch for
Unweighted Gower already normalises each feature to [0–1] per its range — but feature groups
with more columns implicitly carry more total weight in the final distance.
(FinEdu, ESG, Digital, BankFriend, LifeStyle, Luxury, Saving — 7 cols)
(Age, Gender, Job, Area, CitySize, FamilySize — 6 cols)

g.text: with no ground truth to check

svg.text: Recommended: run unweighted first → inspect segment profiles → apply group weights if one dimension dominates unfairly
